entries.title: Tab Session Semantic Search
entries.notes: Indexes page text in background using lightweight browser storage, enabling full-text search across all open tabs. Unique angle vs. bookmark tools because it searches live page content. Builds fast with chrome.tabCapture and DOM text extraction.
entries.pain: Users lose track of information spread across dozens of open tabs and waste time re-reading content to find what they need.

entries.title: API Error Pattern Clusterer
entries.notes: Uses text similarity clustering on captured network errors to auto-group by error message patterns. Unique vs. generic log analyzers because it targets API error semantics. Ships as Chrome extension with optional cloud sync for team dashboards.
entries.pain: Developers waste hours manually grouping similar API errors to identify root causes instead of fixing them.

entries.title: Product Spec Comparison Generator
entries.notes: Extracts structured spec data from product pages and auto-generates side-by-side comparison tables. Differentiates from price trackers by focusing on spec data. Quick build using DOM scraping with AI-assisted field extraction.
entries.pain: Online shoppers spend too long manually comparing product specs across multiple e-commerce pages.

entries.title: Conference Message Queue Scheduler
entries.notes: Queues follow-up messages during conference browsing with optimal send-time scheduling. Unique timing angle vs. generic outreach tools. Simple build using LinkedIn's API surface with local storage for scheduling logic.
entries.pain: Sales reps send LinkedIn connection requests during conferences but forget to follow up with personalized messages afterward.

entries.title: DOM Breadcrumb Navigation Tracer
entries.notes: Overlays interactive breadcrumb path from any element to root, clickable to jump levels. Unique visual navigation vs. DevTools tree views. Uses MutationObserver for dynamic updates.
entries.pain: Debugging deep DOM hierarchies requires constant scrolling to understand element ancestry.

entries.title: SEC Filing Funding Event Alert
entries.notes: Monitors EDGAR for new filings by tracked companies and alerts when funding rounds close. Different from generic news alerts by targeting SEC-sourced signals. Simple RSS monitoring plus company matching logic.
entries.pain: Sales teams miss prospect funding announcements that signal buying readiness, losing competitive advantage.

entries.title: WebGL Shader Compile Timer
entries.notes: Overlays per-shader compilation times extracted from WebGL context profiling. Niche but valuable for gaming/web-graphics devs. Uses extension telemetry APIs to capture compile events.
entries.pain: WebGL developers struggle to isolate shader compilation bottlenecks in complex 3D web applications.

entries.title: Batch Contrast Compliance Reporter
entries.notes: Scans entire page and flags all text/background pairs failing WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA. Different from single-element checkers by operating at scale. Exports CSV report for remediation tracking.
entries.pain: Accessibility testers waste time checking color contrast pair-by-pair instead of getting instant batch results.

entries.title: Gong Transcript Follow-up Drafter
entries.notes: Uses Gong transcript API to extract key moments and auto-drafts personalized follow-up emails. Different from generic AI email writers by using call-specific context. Requires Gong OAuth integration.
entries.pain: Sales reps spend 15+ minutes drafting follow-up emails after calls instead of contacting more prospects.

entries.title: Extension Performance Leaderboard
entries.notes: Shows ranked list of installed extensions by CPU/memory impact and page load delay. Unique consumer angle vs. dev-focused performance tools. Uses chrome.processes API for real-time metrics.
entries.pain: Users notice browser slowdown but have no way to identify which of their 20+ extensions is causing it.

entries.title: Job Posting Remote Signal Extractor
entries.notes: Parses job posting location text to classify as remote/hybrid/onsite with confidence score. Different from tech-stack extractors by targeting work arrangement signals. Regex + light NLP on location fields.
entries.pain: Recruiters and sales reps waste time applying to or prospecting jobs that are hybrid/remote incompatible.

entries.title: Prospect Glassdoor Sentiment Overlay
entries.notes: Overlays Glassdoor ratings, CEO approval, and culture keywords when visiting prospect company pages. Different from tech-stack tools by measuring workplace sentiment. Uses company domain matching to Glassdoor pages.
entries.pain: Sales reps lack cultural fit signals when prospecting enterprise accounts, leading to poor meeting conversion.

entries.title: Interactive Element Page Overlay
entries.notes: Highlights all interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs) as a clean overlay panel. Different from screen readers by providing visual map. Uses pointer-events and role attribute detection.
entries.pain: Users with motor impairments need to identify clickable elements on cluttered pages without trial-and-error.

entries.title: LLM Context Usage Real-time Meter
entries.notes: Displays running token count as you type in AI chat interfaces, estimates remaining capacity. Unique real-time angle vs. periodic calculators. Works via DOM observation of chat interfaces.
entries.pain: AI users hit context limits unexpectedly and lose conversation history because they cannot track token usage.

entries.title: Page Text Readability Heatmap
entries.notes: Colors paragraphs by Flesch-Kincaid reading level, creating a visual difficulty map of the page. Different from summary tools by focusing on readability signal. Lightweight DOM analysis.
entries.pain: Content creators and readers have no quick way to assess if web article text matches their skill level.
